ogTitle: Toorloo Arm vs Toorongo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toorloo Arm and Toorongo.
heading: Toorloo Arm vs Toorongo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toorloo Arm, Victoria and Toorongo, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorongo has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Toorloo Arm (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toorloo Arm or Toorongo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toorloo Arm has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Toorongo scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toorloo Arm scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Toorongo scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toorloo Arm or Toorongo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorongo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
